snippets.title: Everyday Poetry commands
snippets.code:
poetry init                       # scaffold pyproject.toml
poetry add openai tiktoken        # add runtime deps + update lock
poetry add --group dev pytest ruff
poetry install                    # install from the lock
poetry run pytest                 # run a command in the env
poetry lock                       # re-resolve and refresh the lock
snippets.explanation: add/install/run cover the daily loop; lock refreshes the resolved version set.

snippets.title: A pyproject.toml (Poetry)
snippets.code:
[tool.poetry]
name = "rag-app"
version = "0.1.0"
description = ""

[tool.poetry.dependencies]
python = "^3.11"
openai = "^1.40"
tiktoken = "^0.7"

[tool.poetry.group.dev.dependencies]
pytest = "^8.0"
ruff = "^0.5"

[build-system]
requires = ["poetry-core"]
build-backend = "poetry.core.masonry.api"
snippets.explanation: Direct deps and a separate dev group are declared declaratively; carets allow compatible updates.

snippets.title: Export to requirements.txt (interop)
snippets.code:
poetry export -f requirements.txt --output requirements.txt --without-hashes
#   needs the export plugin on newer Poetry versions
snippets.explanation: Handy when a deployment target expects a plain requirements.txt instead of the lockfile.
